title: Farmer Enchants [Light QoL for Farmers] (Fabric)
description: Lightweight farming enchants for hoes and blocks, including Big House and Honey Overflow (particles, extra beehive honey), plus Autosow, Grid, Fertility, Collector, Oasis.
body:
# 🌾 Farmer Enchants – farming enchantments for hoes & blocks (Fabric 1.21.x)

Tired of replanting and micromanaging fields? This lightweight mod adds smart hoe enchantments—and now basic block enchanting plus Composter enchant progression—to automate and supercharge farming.

## ✨ Features

* 🌱 Autosow – Auto Harvest & Replant: Right-click (or break) fully grown crops to instantly harvest and replant. Supported: Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroots, Torchflower, Pitcher Crop.
* 🌿 Fertility – Faster Growth (not fully mature): Right-click immature crops to raise their age up to `maxAge − 1`; Autosow replants at that age too.
* 🧭 Grid – 3×3 / 5×5 Area + Tilling: Expands Autosow/Fertility/Collector/Planting to an area and tills Grass/Dirt/Path → Farmland (Coarse Dirt → Dirt) on right-click. Improved mechanics in this update.
* 🎒 Collector – Auto-pickup: Sends harvested drops straight to your inventory (right- and left-click).
* 💧 Oasis – Permanently Hydrated Farmland: Right-click Farmland to make it never dry out; costs 5 durability per newly blessed block and works with Grid. Improved behavior in this update.
* 🪶 Feather Falling – No longer destroys crops when landing. Includes a config option to toggle this behavior.
* 🧩 Block Enchanting (basic mini-API): Foundation for enchanting blocks. Enchanted blocks now emit ambient particles.
* 🏠 Big House – Enchantment helping to fit more bees into Beehive.
* 🍯 Honey Overflow – Enchantment with a dedicated mini-API for BeehiveBlock to collect extra honey, plus unique particles (density of particles depends on quantity of extraHoney).

## 🧺 Composter Enchants (NEW)

Using the Composter now unlocks enchantments through usage milestones:

* 20 uses – Fortune I
* 50 uses – Bio Boost
* 100 uses – Fortune II
* 150 uses – Magic Pot (new way to obtain Farmer Enchants)
* 250 uses – Fortune III

### Effects:

* Fortune – more bone meal
* Bio Boost – fewer points needed to level the composter
* Magic Pot – grants Farmer Enchant books via composting

## 🔧 Config

File: config/farmerenchants.json
Toggles: enable/disable each enchant, require seeds, Fortune multiplier, villager trades, Feather Falling protection, and more.

## 🤝 Integration

Works with Enchanting Table and Anvil (books).
Singleplayer & servers.
Requires Fabric API.

## 🔎 How to obtain

* Autosow — Enchanting Table; Farmer (Level 5 / Master) trade
* Collector — Enchanting Table; Librarian (Level 3) trade
* Fertility — Enchanting Table; Farmer (Level 5 / Master) trade
* Grid — Enchanting Table; Farmer (Level 5 / Master) trade
* Oasis — Enchanting Table; Fisherman (Level 5 / Master) trade
* Big House — Villager trades: Farmer (30 emeralds), Shepherd (8 emeralds)
* Honey Overflow — Villager trades: Farmer (20 emeralds), Shepherd (10 emeralds)
* Magic Pot — unlocked via Composter usage progression

## 🧪 For modders

* Block Enchanting mini-API: hook into basic block-enchant behavior.
* Beehive mini-API: helpers for BeehiveBlock to manage/collect extra honey.

## 🌍 Supported languages

* English
* Chinese (Simplified/Traditional) [beta]
* Spanish
* Russian
* Portuguese
* German

## 🤝 Looking for more QoL mods for farmers?

Pair it with:
• Farmland Water – Walk Water by Fields
• AutoSow – Auto Harvest & Replant
• Stack Manager

Perfect for large farms, automation setups, and resource-focused survival bases—less clicking, more crops!
